# Leather Armors
# https://revengeofthefallengame.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Leather%20Armors&prop=wikitext

It's the armor of medium range classes (archer, huntress, rogue, trickster, assassin and ninja). It focuses on average defense and offensive stats. 
<div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 20px 20px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Speciality</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Primal</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = BonemailOfTheFallen.png
| link = Bonemail of the Fallen
| text = Bonemail of the Fallen
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = LycaonsHide.png
| link = Lycaon's Hide
| text = Lycaon's Hide
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Legendary</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
|{{ImageBlack
| file = LokisRaiment.png
| link = Loki's Raiment
| text = Loki's Raiment
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = CarriersSuit.png
| link = Carrier's Suit
| text = Carrier's Suit
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = MalevolentArmor.png
| link = Malevolent Armor
| text = Malevolent Armor
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = HarlequinArmor.png
| link = Harlequin Armor
| text = Harlequin Armor
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = RedBeehemothArmor.png
| link = Red Beehemoth Armor
| text = Red Beehemoth Armor
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = ArmorOfNil.png
| link = Armor of Nil
| text = Armor of Nil
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = CheaterLightArmor.png
| link = Cheater Light Armor
| text = Cheater Light Armor
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Heroic</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = DestructorArmor.png
| link = Destructor Armor
| text = Destructor Armor
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = LeatherArmorOfTheAsgardGuardian.png
| link = Leather Armor of the Asgard Guardian
| text = Leather Armor of the Asgard Guardian
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = ArmorOfTheDepths.png
| link = Armor of the Depths
| text = Armor of the Depths
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = LightningGodArmor.png
| link = Lightning God Armor
| text = Lightning God Armor
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = AcidArmor.png
| link = Acid Armor
| text = Acid Armor
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = WoodenArmorOfTheAppleTree.png
| link = Wooden Armor of the Apple Tree
| text = Wooden Armor of the Apple Tree
}}
|-
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = SpectralClothArmor.png
| link = Spectral Cloth Armor
| text = Spectral Cloth Armor
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = LeafDragonHideArmor.png
| link = Leaf Dragon Hide Armor
| text = Leaf Dragon Hide Armor
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = BlueBeehemothArmor.png
| link = Blue Beehemoth Armor
| text = Blue Beehemoth Armor
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = CoralSilkArmor.png
| link = Coral Silk Armor
| text = Coral Silk Armor
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = FrostDrakeHideArmor.png
| link = Frost Drake Hide Armor
| text = Frost Drake Hide Armor
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Artifact</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = TheScorchedArmor.png
| link = The Scorched Armor
| text = The Scorched Armor
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = ChampionsAttire.png
| link = Champion's Attire
| text = Champion's Attire
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = TheHiddenArmor.png
| link = The Hidden Armor
| text = The Hidden Armor
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = TheRelentlessArmor.png
| link = The Relentless Armor
| text = The Relentless Armor
}}
|-
|{{ImageBlack
| file = MantleOfSkuld.png
| link = Mantle of Skuld
| text = Mantle of Skuld
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = ApiaryArmor.png
| link = Apiary Armor
| text = Apiary Armor
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = GolemGarments.png
| link = Golem Garments
| text = Golem Garments
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RagsOfTheHost.png
| link = Rags of the Host
| text = Rags of the Host
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Unique</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = SnakeskinArmor.png
| link = Snakeskin Armor
| text = Snakeskin Armor
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = YellowBeehemothArmor.png
| link = Yellow Beehemoth Armor
| text = Yellow Beehemoth Armor
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Galactic</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = CosmicDragonhide.png
| link = Cosmic Dragonhide
| text = Cosmic Dragonhide
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Uncommon</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = HippogriffHideArmor.png
| link = Hippogriff Hide Armor
| text = Hippogriff Hide Armor
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = GriffonHideArmor.png
| link = Griffon Hide Armor
| text = Griffon Hide Armor
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = HydraSkinArmor.png
| link = Hydra Skin Armor
| text = Hydra Skin Armor
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = WyrmhideArmor.png
| link = Wyrmhide Armor
| text = Wyrmhide Armor
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Normal</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
|{{ImageBlack
| file = WolfskinArmor.png
| link = Wolfskin Armor
| text = Wolfskin Armor
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = LeatherArmor.png
| link = Leather Armor
| text = Leather Armor
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = BasiliskHideArmor.png
| link = Basilisk Hide Armor
| text = Basilisk Hide Armor
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = MinotaurHideArmor.png
| link = Minotaur Hide Armor
| text = Minotaur Hide Armor
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = BearskinArmor.png
| link = Bearskin Armor
| text = Bearskin Armor
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = ChimeraHideArmor.png
| link = Chimera Hide Armor
| text = Chimera Hide Armor
}}
|-
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = WyvernSkinArmor.png
| link = Wyvern Skin Armor
| text = Wyvern Skin Armor
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = StuddedLeatherArmor.png
| link = Studded Leather Armor
| text = Studded Leather Armor
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = DrakeHideArmor.png
| link = Drake Hide Armor
| text = Drake Hide Armor
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RocLeatherArmor.png
| link = Roc Leather Armor
| text = Roc Leather Armor
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = LeviathanArmor.png
| link = Leviathan Armor
| text = Leviathan Armor
}}
|}
</div>

<div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 20px 20px; padding: 15px;">
